title: Better Totem
description: Adds a funny totem to minecraft without mods.
body:
[My Website](https://pandadev.net) **Works with every other resource pack, just put it on the very top** ***

Better Totem replaces the traditional totem of undying with a coffee cup model. The pack adds a touch of realism to the game by bringing in a more familiar and everyday item as a new way to play. Also, the totem or “Power Coffee” is now better recognizable and unique. *** Check out my other projects on [my profile](https://modrinth.com/user/PandaDEV)
